message:
fix(artifact-merge): catch delta runtime errors and coerce domain strings on research threads

Two improvements to artifact merge resilience:

1. Wrap each delta operation (ADD/EDIT/KILL) in a try-catch to prevent
   a single throwing delta from aborting the entire merge pipeline.
   Runtime exceptions are captured as DELTA_RUNTIME_ERROR entries in
   the errors array with the original delta payload preserved for
   debugging.

2. Call coerceDomainStrings() on normalized payloads before assigning
   to research_thread sections (both initial creation and subsequent
   edits) and to general section items. This ensures domain-specific
   string fields (e.g., dates, IDs) are consistently typed before
   storage, preventing type mismatch errors in downstream consumers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
